task_completion.description: Open the Flight Crew View application
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Flight Crew View app launched and visible on the device screen.

task_completion.description: Open the main navigation menu in the app
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the main navigation menu (such as a side drawer or hamburger menu) open and visible within the Flight Crew View app.

task_completion.description: Explore the navigation menu to view all top-level items
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent scrolling through the navigation menu to reveal all items, ensuring none are missed.

task_completion.description: Create or open the target output file
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent opening a text editor or terminal and specifying the exact path '/sdcard/menu_audit.txt'.

task_completion.description: Write the identified menu items to the file
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent actively typing, pasting, or echoing the list of menu items into the file, formatted with one item per line.

task_completion.description: Save the correct list of top-level menu items
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the final saved file show at least 8 menu items in order, including Friends, Settings, Crew Chat, History, Home/Schedule, Hotel/Airport Lookup, Contact Developer, and Subscription info.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual application GUI to find the menu
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the agent visually opened the app and its menu, rather than using terminal commands (e.g., dumpsys, apktool) to extract strings from the app package.

integrity.description: Agent did not hallucinate menu items based on prior knowledge
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the agent does NOT list 'Notifications' as a top-level menu item, as this would indicate relying on incorrect assumptions rather than visual evidence.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely saved the output to the requested file
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the text was actually saved to '/sdcard/menu_audit.txt' (e.g., via a save button in an editor or a successful redirection in terminal), rather than just being typed and left unsaved.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The output file must be exactly '/sdcard/menu_audit.txt'. The Flight Crew View app's main navigation menu contains at least 8 top-level items. Verified items include: Friends, Settings, Crew Chat, History, Home/Schedule, Hotel/Airport Lookup, Contact Developer, and Subscription info. 'Notifications' is a feature within Settings, NOT a top-level menu item.
